insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use this hook. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing ones to avoid future breaking changes. They should explore alternative solutions for intercepting the buyer journey. The deprecation does not immediately break existing extensions, but it's essential to plan for the transition to ensure compatibility with future API versions.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in how checkout UI extensions interact with the buyer journey, potentially affecting their shopping experience. However, the deprecation is designed to be gradual, allowing merchants to adapt without immediate disruption.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation matters because it reflects Shopify's evolving approach to checkout customization and the need for developers to adapt their extensions to ensure long-term compatibility and merchant satisfaction.

also_worth_knowing.text: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows server-side code to handle breaking changes to action configurations, reducing validation failures. This change gives developers more control over workflow execution.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs, ensuring that workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment. This change streamlines workflow execution and reduces potential errors.
The Shopify CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes changes to app updates, GCS bundle upload validation, and fixes for long URL wrapping in banners and alerts.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices for all published apps. This change aims to promote fair and trustworthy reviews.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10. Developers should update their code to reflect this change.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more precise region configuration. This change is available in Admin GraphQL API version 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting from API version 2026-10. This change provides more accurate fulfillment status information.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is being deprecated, starting from version 2026-07. Existing extensions will continue to work, but developers should plan to update their code.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis May June 2026 update introduces new features, including typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants and adding them to cart. This change is available in the React SDK.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product and location.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and inferring compatibility dates from the resolved Hydrogen package.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, deprecates APIs, and improves Shopify Flow

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new fields, such as lineItem on the GiftCard object, and legalEntityId on the BusinessEntity type. Additionally, the Customer Account API has been updated with draft order deposit fields and discount application information. The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions has been deprecated.

themes.title: Shopify Flow Improvements
themes.detail: Shopify Flow now resolves an action's runtime_url on every execution, and changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes. This gives server-side code more control over how breaking changes to an action's configuration fields are handled.

themes.title: Deprecations and Removals
themes.detail: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types have been removed in the Customer Account API version 2026-10. The discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object has been deprecated in favor of approximateDiscountedUnitPrice. The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation has been deprecated.

actions.text: Update server-side code to handle breaking changes to Action extensions
Remove use of deprecated useBuyerJourneyIntercept API
